title: ixeridium pusillum
intro: Ixeridium pusillum, also known as the dwarf or small ixeridium, is a small, perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Ixeridium pusillum has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as possessing antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Ixeridium pusillum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
